    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Order]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]

    FROM [KeyFeatures] AS [k]
    WHERE [k].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [k0] ON [p0].[Id] = [k0].[ProjectId]

    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [c2] ON [p0].[Id] = [c2].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Order], [p0].[Id], [k0].[Id], [c1].[Id]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Order]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [k].[Id], [k].[CreatedAt], [k].[Date], [k].[FeatureType], [k].[IsDeleted], [k].[Link], [k].[ProjectId], [k].[Title], [k].[Title_Ar], [k].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [KeyFeatures] AS [k]
    WHERE [k].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [k0] ON [p0].[Id] = [k0].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Date], [c].[Description], [c].[Description_Ar], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ProjectId], [c].[Title], [c].[Title_Ar], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Version]

    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [c2] ON [p0].[Id] = [c2].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Order], [p0].[Id], [k0].[Id], [c1].[Id]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Order]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]

    FROM [KeyFeatures] AS [k]
    WHERE [k].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [k0] ON [p0].[Id] = [k0].[ProjectId]

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Date], [c].[Description], [c].[Description_Ar], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ProjectId], [c].[Title], [c].[Title_Ar], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Version]

) AS [c1] ON [p0].[Id] = [c1].[ProjectId]

    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [c2] ON [p0].[Id] = [c2].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Order], [p0].[Id], [k0].[Id], [c1].[Id]
